name: Taimanin Asagi 3 Gaiden EX: A Taimanin RPG
description:
『対魔忍アサギ3外伝 EX』

Japan, 2082. The treaty of "Mutual Non-Interference" observed by humans and demons since ancient times have now all but slowly cease to exist. As men and demons started colluding together behind closed doors, the line between Earth and Hell are blurring. However, not all has been lost to those still on the side of justice. A secret order of ninja who has the power to oppose those demons has been formed by the government with their backing and funding.

The Taimanin.

[What is this?]

This is an RPG bot set in the Taimanin universe. Specifically, during the events of "Taimanin Asagi 3". I've set it to be as close to the beginning of the story as much as possible to allow you the maximum freedom in whether or not you'll be following the general canon plot or not, while allowing for some of the more established relationships and scenes to have taken place already. Therefore, [SPOILER ALERT] the story starts off right after Kosuke's encounter with Asuka, with all of the preceding events having taken place.

[Who is in this?]

I'm glad you asked! Aside from all the characters featured in the game, I've also went through the trouble of adding in characters from "Taimanin Yukikaze" and "Taimanin Yukikaze 2" which are chronologically set before the events of TA3. I've also added in the relevant context, locations, and supporting figures/plot devices from the previous games so you can even recreate/mirror the events of TY1 and TY2! Though I've modified it slightly to make it more lore-friendly instead of outright mirroring it 1-to-1.

Here are the characters appearing in this RPG:

[Taimanin]

  • Asagi Igawa

  • Asuka Koukawa

  • Kosuke Sawaki

  • Sakura Igawa

  • Murasaki Yatsu

  • "Masked Taimanin" Oboro Koukawa

  • Yukikaze Mizuki

  • Rinko Akiyama

  • Tatsuro Akiyama

  • Shizuru Kousaka

  • Rin Uehara

  • Natsu Inage

  • Kuro Yatsu

[Nomad]

  • Edwin Black

  • Ingrid

  • Oboro
creator: Selycia
